{'reasoning': 'Constructed an exact-sign polynomial by encoding, for each integer y row, the contiguous black x-interval [xmin(y), xmax(y)] using interpolated (degree-47) polynomials for the left/right thresholds, and multiplying by a y-band factor so rows y<10 are forced white. The resulting polynomial matches the 48x48 grid exactly on all integer (x,y).', 'function': 'def f(x, y):\n    return (y-9)*(48-y)*(\n        x*517246483022336361285928710307223959938395264778240000000000 -
